pattern: A single right-to-left sweep carries the running maximum of everything already seen, so each slot can be overwritten in constant time instead of rescanning its suffix.
hints: Each position only cares about the largest value that lies strictly to its right - nothing on its left matters.
If you walk from the back, the maximum of the suffix to the right of the current slot is just the running maximum you have accumulated so far.
Remember the value at the current index before overwriting it, store the running max into that index, then fold the saved value into the running max. The last index becomes -1.

edge_inputs.description: mixed values with a late peak
strictly increasing - every slot must look past nearer smaller values
strictly decreasing - running max stays at the first element
the global maximum sits at the very end

stress.description: large random array exercising the running-max sweep at the length cap
stress.note: values within the stated bounds; reference handles any ordering
